note: OCG Standard §25 ocg-private-input@1. policy_parameters carries ONLY the sha256-salted@1 commitment to the private capital + RWA figures -- never eligible_capital or risk_weighted_assets themselves. Disclosure material lives OUT-OF-BAND in art-415-check-capital-adequacy-private.disclosure.json (test-only). Vector 1: above minimum (16% CET1). Vector 2: below minimum (6% CET1).

vectors.name: above_minimum_16pct_cet1
vectors.description: Private eligible capital $16B, RWA $100B (disclosed out-of-band). CET1 ratio 16% -- above the 10.5% Basel III/3.1 minimum, well_capitalized tier.

policy_parameters.regulatory_citation: Basel III/3.1 CET1 minimum incl. capital conservation buffer (BCBS d424); Solvency II SCR coverage minimum 100% (Delegated Regulation (EU) 2015/35).

output_payload.regulatory_basis: Basel III/3.1 CET1 minimum incl. capital conservation buffer (BCBS d424); Solvency II SCR coverage minimum 100% (Delegated Regulation (EU) 2015/35). Verdict proves the committed capital and RWA figures clear the pinned regulatory minimum — the underlying figures are never disclosed (OCG Standard §25 ocg-private-input@1).
output_payload.pii_note: ZERO PII disclosed: eligible capital and risk-weighted assets are a private witness, never present in policy_parameters or output_payload. Only the above/below-minimum verdict is public.
output_payload.not_legal_advice: Not legal or regulatory advice. Capital adequacy determinations require review by a qualified capital/treasury officer and the applicable prudential regulator.

vectors.name: below_minimum_6pct_cet1
vectors.description: Private eligible capital $6B, RWA $100B (disclosed out-of-band). CET1 ratio 6% -- below the 10.5% Basel III/3.1 minimum, below_minimum tier.

policy_parameters.regulatory_citation: Basel III/3.1 CET1 minimum incl. capital conservation buffer (BCBS d424); Solvency II SCR coverage minimum 100% (Delegated Regulation (EU) 2015/35).

output_payload.regulatory_basis: Basel III/3.1 CET1 minimum incl. capital conservation buffer (BCBS d424); Solvency II SCR coverage minimum 100% (Delegated Regulation (EU) 2015/35). Verdict proves the committed capital and RWA figures clear the pinned regulatory minimum — the underlying figures are never disclosed (OCG Standard §25 ocg-private-input@1).
output_payload.pii_note: ZERO PII disclosed: eligible capital and risk-weighted assets are a private witness, never present in policy_parameters or output_payload. Only the above/below-minimum verdict is public.
output_payload.not_legal_advice: Not legal or regulatory advice. Capital adequacy determinations require review by a qualified capital/treasury officer and the applicable prudential regulator.
